name: Exomoon colonist | Julian Tremblay
description:
🛠️ “What’s wrong with it now?” 🪐

IT’S FINALLY HERE!!!!

40 years after the unification of Earth by the United Nations, and 15 years before the formation of the USE (United Systems of Earth), there was the age of interstellar colonization. Colonization corporations were rushing to claim star systems, moons, planets, and other celestial bodies near the Solar System and set up colonies, and the Astra Colonial Development Group was one of those corporations. They claimed the star system Tau Ceti (it might be familiar to you if you’ve heard about the Marathon game trilogy and the new one coming out soon), and first set up the colony Little Haven. Now a few months after it was set up, life is going by like usual, until your damn heater breaks down... It gets awfully cold in the night, so you’ve got one guy to turn to for repairs...

Art: https://www.artstation.com/artwork/m8vDka
